## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between HockeyStack and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and progress.](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [3 blogs published, 4 new blogs ready for review, 2 refreshes in progress](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Competitive comparison blogs require more detailed review due to granularity](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [New blog ideas discussed and prioritized, focusing on actionable insights and revenue impact](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [LLM traffic impact identified as potential new content area to explore](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)

## Topics

### Content Update and Progress

  - [3 blogs published on HockeyStack website](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [4 new blogs ready for review: 6sense alternatives, HockeyStack vs. CommonRoom, CaliberMind vs. Visible, HockeyStack vs. DreamData](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [2 refreshes based on top-performing content in progress](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Traffic performance check scheduled for early next week](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)

### Challenges with Competitive Comparison Blogs

  - [Difficulty in obtaining granular details for competitor comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Knowledge transfer from sales team experiences challenging](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Suggestion to potentially reach out to competitors for demos to better understand their perspective](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Positive note: Limited number of these comparisons left in the pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)

### New Blog Ideas Discussion

  - [Reviewed and prioritized non-competitor related blog ideas](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Focus on actionable insights and revenue impact rather than general overviews](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Deprioritized content marketing-focused topics as they don't align with main use case](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [Agreed to avoid controversial topics like fingerprinting](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)

### Content Visibility Issue

  - [Published blogs not appearing on the main blog page](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Team to investigate and resolve the visibility problem](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)

### HockeyStack Labs Reports

  - [Discussed potential content around LLM traffic measurement and its pipeline impact](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [Raw data available for further analysis if needed](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

### Sprint Timeline Update

  - [Currently in week 6 of 8-week sprint](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Opt-out period approaching in week 7](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Amulya to review blogs ready for publication and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
  - [Team to investigate and resolve blog visibility issue on the website](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Consider creating content around LLM traffic measurement and pipeline impact](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [Erik to potentially explore raw data from HockeyStack Labs reports for content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [Aida to follow up with refreshes and flag opt-out period to Amir](https://fathom.video/share/rNe9zw1bNxzgoZmxphRn9LijRsWyoajj?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
